message:
test: Add distributed_trace_remote_invariants integration tests (bd-3q6f)

New integration test file covering gaps identified in bd-3q6f:

- Causality verification edge cases for distributed traces
- Certificate determinism and verification
- Replay serialization roundtrips
- Snapshot binary format stability
- Bridge state machine transitions (sync modes, conflict resolution)
- Remote API surface contracts (NodeId, RemoteTaskId, RemoteCap)

This addresses the gap in distributed/trace/remote module testing
identified in the coverage audit matrix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
